Weekly report on autopilot: numbers pull from your tools and land in your inbox every Monday.

sections.headline: The money questions, answered
bullets: How does billing work? Monthly plans bill on the same date each month. One-shot builds are paid up front or in two parts.
Can I cancel anytime? Yes. Website-as-a-Service has no lock-in. Cancel and your site stays live through the paid period.
Do I own my website? On one-shot builds, yes, the code is yours. On subscription, the site stays with the plan while it runs.
What if I start monthly and want to buy it out? You can switch to a one-shot buyout later. We credit part of what you have paid.

pages.seoTitle: About Shift U | Good Tech, Real Results
pages.seoDescription: We build the website and the AI behind it. Sites, WhatsApp agents, and automations that bring more leads and less manual work.

sections.headline: Good tech, real results
sections.subhead: We build the website and the AI behind it.
sections.body: Most agencies sell you one or the other. We do both, under one roof, so your site and your sales engine actually talk to each other.

sections.headline: Small teams deserve real tech
sections.subhead: Enterprise tools without the enterprise headcount.
sections.body: Most owners get stuck with a pretty site that just sits there, or an AI tool nobody set up right. We started Shift U to close that gap. You get the website and the system working together, no tech team required.

sections.headline: Four rules we never break
sections.subhead: Simple principles that keep your project on track.
bullets: Outcome first. We build for leads, not looks.
Plain talk. No jargon, no runaround.
Fast delivery. Live in days, not months.
We stay. Launch is the start, not the finish.

sections.headline: Two countries, one standard
sections.subhead: We serve businesses in Argentina and Canada.
sections.body: Wherever you are, the work is the same. Sites and AI that bring in leads and cut the manual busywork. We work in English.

sections.headline: What you can count on
sections.subhead: Three things that shape every build.
bullets: Honest. We tell you what works and what does not.
Practical. Tech that earns its place, nothing extra.
Present. Real support after the site goes live.

sections.headline: The people behind your build
sections.subhead: Builders who answer their own messages.
sections.body: A small, hands-on team that builds, ships, and supports your project directly. No account managers between you and the work.
sections.flags: [PLACEHOLDER: add team member names, roles, and photos] [PLACEHOLDER: founder bio, 2-3 lines]

sections.headline: Let's build your engine
sections.subhead: A site and AI that work while you sleep.
sections.body: Tell us what you sell. We will show you what to build and what it costs, no pressure.
sections.flags: Secondary CTA available: See our work

pages.seoTitle: Contact Shift U | Book a Call
pages.seoDescription: Book a call or get a quote. We build the website and the AI behind it. Fast replies, no pushy sales.

sections.headline: Let's build it together
sections.subhead: Book a call or get a quote. No pressure, no pitch.
sections.body: Tell us what you need: a website, a WhatsApp agent, or automations that cut the manual work. We reply fast and point you to the right next step.
sections.flags: none

sections.headline: Pick a time that works
sections.subhead: A short call beats a long email thread.
sections.body: Grab a slot and we'll talk through your goals, what to build first, and what it costs. You leave with a clear plan, even if you never hire us.
bullets: 15 to 20 minutes, on your schedule
We reply within [PLACEHOLDER: X hours] on business days
You get a plan and a price, not a sales script
sections.flags: [PLACEHOLDER: confirm response time SLA for book_call promise]

sections.headline: Send the details, get a quote
sections.subhead: Four quick fields. We read every one.
sections.body: Fill the form and we'll come back with a real answer, not a generic auto-reply.
bullets: Your name
Your business
Best email to reach you
What you need (site, AI agent, automation)
sections.flags: none

sections.headline: Chat with us on WhatsApp
sections.subhead: Quick question? Message us directly.
sections.body: Same place your customers would reach you. Ask anything and we'll answer like a human, fast.

sections.headline: Fast replies, zero pressure
sections.subhead: We answer quick and we never push.
sections.body: You get straight answers and a clear price. If we are not the right fit, we will tell you that too.
bullets: Real reply from a real person
Plain talk, no jargon, no hard sell
We stay around after launch
